$comment: GOLDEN spawn.env cross-check oracle for deriveSpawnEnv. HAND-TRANSCRIBED by a human reading the live app.asar env windows (Desktop 1.18286.0) — NOT copied from deriveSpawnEnv output, so the cross-check stays a genuine two-source check rather than a circular one. Each value below was read directly from the W1/W2/W3 window text and resolved by hand against the live fcache gate states. Update this file each release by re-reading the asar, then reconcile any divergence from generator output BEFORE committing. Provenance per key is in the sibling comment keys.

$provenance.W1_env_literal: env:{CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR ... ,systemPrompt: — the local-agent spawn options env object
$provenance.W3_Zrn: return{DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER:"1" ...} — the shared-env helper spread by OnA
$provenance.consts: MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=String(Zv()) -> Zv body ??zae -> zae=kGt -> kGt=6e4 -> 60000; API_TIMEOUT_MS=String(Sde) -> Sde=9e5 -> 900000
$provenance.session_model: standard 1p prod chat localAgent session (t.type!=3p, oauth env=prod, disableCron=true, localAgent=true, sessionType=chat)
